title: Mission to Fuel Station Ergo

{{Quote|I'm rapidly losing the element of surprise. The closer I get to the ''Executor'' and the ''Arc Hammer'', the more clearly I telegraph my movements. General Mohc is most certainly adding reinforcements to protect his investment. I can just imagine what's waiting for me on the ''Executor''. Whoa Kyle. One mission at a time, one mission at a time.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="DFPG">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Mission to Fuel Station Ergo''' was a skirmish in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in which [[Kyle Katarn]] raided the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fuel Station Ergo/Legends|Fuel Station Ergo]] to board a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] headed for the [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].

After Katarn translated the [[nava card]] in the [[Imperial Security Operations]] building, [[Jan Ors]] understood that only [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] knew the ''[[Arc Hammer]]''{{'s}} location at each given time. The ''Hammer'' was making leaps to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to keep its status secret. The only way to reach the factory was via the ''Executor'', and the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] was known to be supplied from Ergo.<ref name="Dark" />

The ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' docked to one of the station's bays. Disguised as a smuggler, Katarn slipped into the Ergo orbital fuel station and proceeded to board the [[smuggler ship]].<ref name="Dark" /> In the station's [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] he relieved an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] from his [[Keycard/Legends|keycard]].<ref name="DFPG" />

In the fuel area, he operated the switches that control a rotating walkway in order to make his way to the main control room. He utilised the stolen keycard to access a cache with supplies, including an [[Assault_cannon/Legends|Assault cannon]]. From there he redirected the movable fueling arm from the docking bay of the ''Crow'' towards the docking bay of the target smuggler ship, which he boarded.<ref name="DFPG" />

Inside the docked ship, he fought several [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] and [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]], and stole one more yellow keycard from an officer, which he used to reach the ship's bridge. He activated the engines, but not before exchanging one last parting message with Ors over [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. With the hijacked ship, he was able to reach the ''Executor''.<ref name="Dark" /><ref name="DFPG" />
